name: Oblixio
steps: Check first with a senior member.
Spread toasted disks on silpats evenly apart.
Either preheat the oven to 220 degrees fan 100 or preheat the grill.
Dust the toasted disks with neutral caramel powder to a generous section.
Put uncovered in oven or under the salamander until caramelized.
Remove from oven and layer one half of the disks with smoked cheese, coriander, and lime.
Continue to place the other empty disk on top.
Place back in the oven or salamander to melt the cheese and to enable the two to be closed together.

finishing_and_plating: Place the microcorriander on a folded napkin.
Grate the lime and smoked cheese on top.
